description: Perform a forensic cookie analysis on three websites to identify user tracking behavior. A briefing document at /home/ga/Desktop/forensic_briefing.txt contains the target sites (CNN, Weather.com, Wikipedia) and reporting requirements. Visit each site to inspect the cookies deposited and produce a detailed forensic report at /home/ga/Desktop/cookie_forensic_report.txt. The report must include the cookie counts for each site, identify specific third-party tracking domains found (e.g., DoubleClick, Criteo), and provide a comparative analysis of which sites have the heaviest tracking footprint.
